---
title: Characterizing and Demystifying the Implicit Convolution Algorithm on Commercial
  Matrix-Multiplication Accelerators
author:
- Yangjie Zhou
- Mengtian Yang
- Cong Guo
- Jingwen Leng
- Yun Liang
- Quan Chen
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2110.03901.pdf
talk_source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fsIP_fPcLyg
journ: IISWC
year: 2021
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 50
---
